seo.title: Certalytic – EU-sovereign hiring integrity screening
seo.description: Cross-check CVs, merged interview transcripts, and public profiles before you send the offer. EU-sovereign infrastructure for senior technical hiring teams.

hero.eyebrow: The checkpoint before the offer letter
hero.description: Certalytic is the final integrity dossier for senior technical hires-cross-checking CVs, merged interview transcripts, and public profiles on EU-sovereign infrastructure. Two minutes of review. Zero automated hire or reject decisions.
hero.imageAlt: Recruiter reviewing a candidate integrity dossier before making a hire decision

privacy.eyebrow: The only GDPR-sovereign interview intelligence layer
privacy.description: In Europe, candidate audio and CVs cannot route through US cloud LLMs. Certalytic processes exclusively on EU soil - the compliance moat that disqualifies American competitors from your senior hiring pipeline.

trustPoints.euInfrastructure: Candidate data is kept and processed within EU based infrastructure
trustPoints.audioDeletion: Transcription audio is deleted after transcription completes

product.title: Build the integrity dossier before you send the offer.
product.description: Upload the CV and merged interview transcripts - the deliberate final step after your technical loop. Certalytic returns four weighted integrity signals, cited flags, and follow-up prompts your hiring manager can act on.

demo.title: Sample integrity dossier
demo.description: Exactly what your Head of Talent or CTO receives before signing off - integrity score, signal profile, flags, and recommended follow-ups. Exportable as a watermarked PDF.

pricing.title: Pricing that pays for itself on the first prevented mistake
pricing.description: Scale to agency volume or mandate team-wide checkpoints - a fraction of one mis-hire.
pricing.freePlanBanner: {tokens} free integrity dossiers per month on the Free plan, no credit card required.

audience.title: Built for high-stakes technical hiring - not volume recruiting.
audience.cto: CTOs & engineering leaders hiring senior ICs and staff engineers where one bad hire costs months of runway and compounding technical debt.
audience.agency: Technical recruiting agencies placing €100k+ roles who need a defensible integrity checkpoint before presenting candidates to clients.
audience.talentHead: Heads of Talent who mandate a two-minute final screening policy across interviewers - quality control, not data entry.
audience.cardTitle: An insurance policy at the finish line
audience.cardP1: Certalytic sits at the end of your interview loop - after the technical rounds, before the offer letter. Recruiters deliberately assemble the candidate's integrity dossier from CV and transcript sources. That manual step is the checkpoint, not the bottleneck.
audience.cardP2: We package recruiter expertise into a repeatable, EU-sovereign workflow. Probabilistic signals cite evidence; your team stays in control of every advance or rejection.

cta.title: Start with three free integrity dossiers.
cta.description: No credit card. Upload a CV and merged transcript, export your first dossier in minutes.

process.title: Three steps from role to dossier
process.description: Certalytic fits at the end of your interview loop. Create the role, screen each finalist, export the evidence-backed report before anyone signs an offer letter.

1.title: Create a role
1.description: Define the position once-title, job description, and optional context documents. Every candidate screened against this role inherits the same baseline.

2.title: Screen candidates
2.description: Run each applicant through the guided multi-step form: candidate details & CV, cross-reference links, then merged interview transcripts.

3.title: Export the report
3.description: Review the integrity dossier in-app, then export a watermarked PDF for your hiring committee-or batch-export every candidate on a role.

featuresBento.signalsTitle: Four signals. One dossier. One decision checkpoint.
featuresBento.signalsDescription: Recruiters upload the CV and merged transcripts to build the integrity dossier. Each dimension produces a sub-score, indicators, and cited flags before the offer letter goes out.

cv.title: CV authenticity
cv.description: Timeline coherence, employment gaps, and inflated seniority claims against the uploaded CV.

interview.title: Interview behavioral
interview.description: Transcript depth, response latency, rehearsed phrasing, and consistency across interview rounds.

crossSource.title: Cross-source consistency
crossSource.description: LinkedIn, GitHub, and pasted profile content compared against CV and interview claims.

identity.title: Identity confidence
identity.description: Name, email, and handle alignment across documents and public sources.

compositeScore.title: Composite integrity score
compositeScore.description: Weighted sub-scores roll up into one explainable hiring integrity index with cited flags.

speakerTranscripts.title: Speaker-labelled transcripts
speakerTranscripts.description: Upload Zoom or Teams audio - every line tagged by speaker for diarized review.

roleProfiles.title: Reusable role profiles
roleProfiles.description: Save job descriptions once; every screening inherits the same role context.

teamWorkspaces.title: Team workspaces
teamWorkspaces.description: Shared pipelines for in-house TA squads and agencies with seat-based access.

signalSummary.title: Signal summary & follow-ups
signalSummary.description: AI-generated summaries, anomaly flags, and suggested deep-dive questions for interviewers.

behaviourAnalysis.title: Candidate behaviour analysis
behaviourAnalysis.description: Communication style, collaboration indicators, and behavioural watchpoints from interview transcripts.

personalityAnalysis.title: Candidate personality analysis
personalityAnalysis.description: Work style, motivation signals, and culture-fit indicators for hiring-manager context.

screeningPreview.subtitle: Mocked candidate data - identical UI and PDF export to production.
screeningPreview.behaviourDisclaimer: Supplementary context only - excluded from the integrity score.

stats.title: The cost of one bad senior hire dwarfs the price of screening

candidatesScreened.label: Candidates screened
candidatesScreened.detail: Integrity reports generated across technical hiring loops

teams.label: Teams hiring with Certalytic
teams.detail: Recruiters improving selection quality in {countries} countries

audioHours.label: Hours of interview audio processed
audioHours.detail: Speaker-labelled transcripts ready for integrity analysis

savedMillions.label: Estimated cost of bad senior hires avoided
savedMillions.detail: One proxy hire can cost €100k+ in runway, comp, and technical debt

reviews.title: Trusted by teams protecting €100k+ hiring decisions
reviews.description: In-house TA, agencies, and embedded recruiters share how integrity signals changed their technical screening process.

1.quote: We caught rehearsed technical answers before the onsite. The integrity breakdown gave us concrete follow-up questions instead of gut feel.
1.name: Elena V.

2.quote: Cross-referencing CV claims against LinkedIn paste saved us a bad senior hire. The platform mismatch flag was spot on.
2.name: Marcus T.

3.quote: Our team runs 40+ technical screens a month. Certalytic keeps the signal consistent without adding another ATS integration project.
3.name: Sofia K.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: What we're building next - approximate delivery quarters based on current engineering priorities.

ats.title: ATS integrations
ats.description: Push integrity reports into Greenhouse, Lever, and Workday without manual copy-paste.

sso.title: Enterprise SSO
sso.description: SAML and OIDC single sign-on with seat provisioning for agency and in-house TA teams.

batch.title: Batch screening
batch.description: Upload a cohort of candidates against one role profile and compare integrity signals side by side.

api.title: Public API & webhooks
api.description: Programmatic screening triggers and signed webhook delivery for custom hiring stacks.

footer.tagline: The EU-sovereign integrity dossier for senior technical hires. Prevent costly proxy candidates before the offer letter-with probabilistic signals, never automated gates.

dataPrivacy.label: DATA & PRIVACY
dataPrivacy.sovereignDescription: All candidate data is processed exclusively within EU jurisdiction - Hetzner EU datacenters (Germany/Finland) and Mistral AI La Plateforme (Paris, France). No US cloud compute or CDN in the data path.
dataPrivacy.modelTrainingDescription: Candidate data is never used to train, fine-tune, or improve Mistral foundation models.
